title: Clinical Manifestations and Outcomes of Activated Phosphoinositide 3-Kinase δ Syndrome from the USIDNET Cohort.
author: Oh J Garabedian E Fuleihan R Cunningham-Rundles C
content:
S-EPMC8578310 PMC8578310 Clinical Manifestations and Outcomes of Activated Phosphoinositide 3-Kinase δ Syndrome from the USIDNET Cohort.

Background

Activated phosphoinositide 3-kinase δ syndrome is a combined primary immunodeficiency characterized by gain-of-function mutations in PIK3CD
